---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"登录"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/auth/login"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



登录

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"name":"App-Version","in":"header","required":false,"schema":{"type":"string","example":"{{App-Version}}"},"description":"应用版本号"},{"name":"Sys-Type","in":"header","required":false,"schema":{"type":"string","example":"{{Sys-Type}}"},"description":"系统类型"},{"name":"Phone-Model","in":"header","required":false,"schema":{"type":"string","example":"{{Phone-Model}}"},"description":"手机型号"},{"name":"Device-Unique-Id","in":"header","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","example":"{{Device-Unique-Id}}"},"description":"手机终端唯一 ID（app自己提供的）"},{"name":"Lang","in":"header","required":false,"schema":{"type":"string","example":"{{Lang}}"},"description":"语言，中文使用 zh-CN，英文使用 en-US"},{"name":"Time","in":"header","required":true,"schema":{"type":"integer","format":"int64","example":1710000000000},"description":"时间戳（毫秒）"},{"name":"Nonce","in":"header","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","minLength":32,"maxLength":32,"example":"1234567890abcdef1234567890abcdef"},"description":"32 个字符的随机数"}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"required":true,"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","required":["account","password","keyId"],"properties":{"account":{"type":"string","description":"账号"},"password":{"type":"string","description":"密码（RSA加密后）"},"keyId":{"type":"string","description":"密钥ID（来自 /login/pubkey）"}},"title":"LoginRequest"},"examples":{"passwordLogin":{"value":{"account":"demo@example.com","password":"base64-rsa-ciphertext","keyId":"temporary-key-id"}}}}}}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"成功","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"allOf":[{"type":"object","required":["type","version","msgId","code"],"properties":{"type":{"type":"string","description":"消息类型"},"version":{"type":"string","description":"接口版本","example":"v1"},"msgId":{"type":"string","description":"消息 ID"},"code":{"type":"integer","description":"业务状态码，0 表示成功"},"message":{"type":"string","description":"提示信息"}},"title":"BaseResponse"},{"type":"object","properties":{"data":{"type":"object","required":["user","accessToken","refreshToken","expiresIn","clientId"],"properties":{"user":{"type":"object","required":["userId","nickName"],"properties":{"userId":{"type":"string","description":"用户ID"},"userName":{"type":"string","description":"用户名称"},"nickName":{"type":"string","description":"昵称"},"email":{"type":"string","description":"邮箱"},"phoneNumber":{"type":"string","description":"手机号"},"roles":{"type":"string","description":"角色"}},"title":"UserInfo"},"accessToken":{"type":"string","description":"访问令牌"},"refreshToken":{"type":"string","description":"刷新令牌（有效期为 accessToken 有效期 + 30天）"},"expiresIn":{"type":"integer","description":"过期时间（单位：秒）"},"clientId":{"type":"string","description":"后续用于推送,在Header中设置的 ClientId"}},"title":"LoginData"}}}],"example":{"type":"LoginResponse","version":"v1","msgId":"a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-000000000002","code":0,"message":"success","data":{"user":{"userId":"u1001","nickName":"demo-user","email":"demo@example.com","phoneNumber":"13800138000","roles":"admin"},"accessToken":"eyJhbGciOiJSUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9...","refreshToken":"eyJhbGciOiJSUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9...","expiresIn":86400,"clientId":"client-push-id-001"}},"title":"LoginResponse"},"examples":{"loginSuccess":{"value":{"type":"LoginResponse","version":"v1","msgId":"2df2f431-a58d-4fdb-b39c-4f0d29e7ecf6","code":0,"message":"success","data":{"user":{"userId":"u1001","nickName":"demo-user","email":"demo@example.com"},"accessToken":"eyJhbGciOi...","refreshToken":"eyJhbGciOi...","expiresIn":86400}}}}}}},"400":{"description":"请求参数错误","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"example":{"type":"ErrorMessage","version":"v1","msgId":"a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-err000000001","code":400,"message":"参数
